Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants a Python dictionary representing a temporal profile for a supply chain process

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Key requirements 1 Activities involved SS OP RC QI CA PT PK WS DT AS 10 activities 2 The temporal profile should include pairs of activities that eventually follow each other not just directly connected 3 For each pair provide average time standard deviation in seconds 4 Should include pairs separated by multiple steps not just consecutive 5 Dont provide explicit numerical temporal information in the explanation but the LLM should estimate realistic times 6 Should be a representative subset not necessarily all pairs but enough to show complexity

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The process flow appears to be roughly SS OP RC QI CA PT PK WS DT AS

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: But there could be variations and we need to consider pairs that skip steps

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Let me think about realistic timeframes for a high tech electronics supply chain

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: SS to OP Supplier selection to order placement could be days to weeks negotiation selection process OP to RC Order placement to receiving components this is supplier lead time could be weeks to months for electronics components eg 2 to 8 weeks RC to QI Receiving to inspection usually quick hours to days QI to CA Inspection to assembly could be immediate or days depending on queue CA to PT Assembly to testing could be hours to days PT to PK Testing to packaging hours to days PK to WS Packaging to storage hours WS to DT Storage to distribution could be days to weeks depending on orders DT to AS Distribution to after sales support this happens after customer receives it so weeks to months

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now for non consecutive pairs SS to RC Selection to receiving includes selection lead time weeks to months SS to CA Selection to assembly even longer OP to CA Order to assembly lead time inspection RC to PT Receive to testing includes inspection assembly

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Standard deviations should reflect variability supply chains have high variability for external steps shipping supplier delays lower for internal steps

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Let me construct a representative subset with realistic estimates

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
